name: browser-signup
description: Playwright framework for signup/KYC flows with human-in-the-loop pauses. Credentials via 1Password.

scripts.flow: op run --account team-potentialai.1password.com --env-file=.env.1password.test -- npx playwright test
scripts.flow:live: op run --account team-potentialai.1password.com --env-file=.env.1password.live -- npx playwright test
scripts.smoke: op run --account team-potentialai.1password.com --env-file=.env.1password.test -- npx playwright test framework/__tests__
